endpoints.name: GET /addwebhook
endpoints.description: Links a callback url to a user.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{NETATMO_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your NETATMO ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: POST /createnewschedule
endpoints.description: The method createnewschedule creates a new schedule stored in the backup list.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{NETATMO_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your NETATMO ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /devicelist
endpoints.description:
The method devicelist returns the list of devices owned by the user, and their modules.
A device is identified by its _id (which is its mac address) and each device may have one, several or no modules, also identified by an _id.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{NETATMO_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your NETATMO ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /dropwebhook
endpoints.description: Dissociates a webhook from a user.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{NETATMO_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your NETATMO ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /getcamerapicture
endpoints.description: Returns the snapshot associated to an event.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{NETATMO_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your NETATMO ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /geteventsuntil
endpoints.description: Returns the snapshot associated to an event.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{NETATMO_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your NETATMO ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /gethomecoachsdata
endpoints.description: The method gethomecoachsdata Returns data from a user Healthy Home Coach Station (measures and device specific data).
endpoints.notes: Replace {{NETATMO_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your NETATMO ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /gethomedata
endpoints.description: Returns information about users homes and cameras.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{NETATMO_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your NETATMO ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /getlasteventof
endpoints.description: Returns most recent events.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{NETATMO_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your NETATMO ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /getmeasure
endpoints.description: The method getmeasure returns the measurements of a device or a module.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{NETATMO_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your NETATMO ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /getnextevents
endpoints.description: Returns previous events.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{NETATMO_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your NETATMO ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /getpublicdata
endpoints.description: Retrieves publicly shared weather data from Outdoor Modules within a predefined area.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{NETATMO_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your NETATMO ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /getstationsdata
endpoints.description: The method getstationsdata Returns data from a user's Weather Stations (measures and device specific data).
endpoints.notes: Replace {{NETATMO_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your NETATMO ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /getthermostatsdata
endpoints.description: The method getthermostatsdata returns information about user's thermostats such as their last measurements.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{NETATMO_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your NETATMO ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /getthermstate
endpoints.description: The method getthermstate returns the last Thermostat measurements, its current weekly schedule, and, if present, its current manual temperature setpoint.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{NETATMO_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your NETATMO ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /getuser
endpoints.description: The method getuser returns information about a user such as prefered language, prefered units, and list of devices.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{NETATMO_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your NETATMO ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /partnerdevices
endpoints.description: The method partnerdevices returns the list of device_id to which your partner application has access to.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{NETATMO_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your NETATMO ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: POST /setpersonsaway
endpoints.description: Sets a person as 'Away' or the Home as 'Empty'. The event will be added to the user’s timeline.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{NETATMO_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your NETATMO ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: POST /setpersonshome
endpoints.description: Sets a person as 'At home'.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{NETATMO_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your NETATMO ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: POST /setthermpoint
endpoints.description: The method setthermpoint changes the Thermostat manual temperature setpoint.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{NETATMO_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your NETATMO ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: POST /switchschedule
endpoints.description: The method switchschedule switches the Thermostat's schedule to another existing schedule.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{NETATMO_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your NETATMO ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: POST /syncschedule
endpoints.description: The method syncschedule changes the Thermostat weekly schedule.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{NETATMO_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your NETATMO ACCESS TOKEN.
